dimension_notes.abstraction_fitness: Strong: _BaseBM25 base class enforces API parity across 4 variants. Protocol types define clear interfaces. resolve_scorer centralises scorer resolution.
dimension_notes.design_coherence: Much improved: search.py ~750 lines. _types.py centralises types, protocols, and shared helpers. No more duplicated _search_query or scorer resolution.
dimension_notes.high_level_elegance: Clean architecture: base class pattern, Protocol-based interfaces, centralised type system. Remaining: HybridSearch and Reranker could be separate modules.
dimension_notes.mid_level_elegance: resolve_scorer eliminates 4× duplication in process.py. _search_query consolidated. _blend_reranked_scores extracted. Clean, DRY code throughout.
dimension_notes.low_level_elegance: Rust algorithms well-optimized. editops_multiword still allocates inside per-char loop. Python code clean with Protocol types.
dimension_notes.cross_module_architecture: _types.py is single source for Result, MetaResult, Protocols, resolve_scorer, _search_query. No more cross-module duplication.
dimension_notes.type_safety: Protocol types (ScorerProtocol, RerankerProtocol, EmbeddingCallback) replace raw Any. resolve_scorer has clear return types. Self used for from_column.
dimension_notes.contract_coherence: from_column uses Self return type. Protocol types define clear interfaces. Some internal methods could still use Protocol types.
dimension_notes.error_consistency: explain() raises descriptive ValueError. RuntimeError for missing index. Import errors chain properly. Consistent patterns.
dimension_notes.naming_quality: _BaseBM25, resolve_scorer, ScorerProtocol follow Python conventions. WRatio/QRatio PascalCase remains for backward compat.
dimension_notes.logic_clarity: resolve_scorer eliminates 4× duplication. _search_query consolidated. Each function has single responsibility.
dimension_notes.initialization_coupling: add_documents/remove_documents rebuild the entire Rust index. Inherent to BM25 data structure, acceptable for typical corpus sizes.
dimension_notes.convention_outlier: WRatio/QRatio PascalCase for backward compat. BM25Algorithm vs BM25Variant serve different Rust endpoints.
dimension_notes.dependency_health: Clean optional dependency guards. Import error chains preserved. Protocol types are stdlib-only.
dimension_notes.test_strategy: 66 parametrized tests verify API parity across 4 BM25 variants. 10 langchain tests. Total 610 tests. Coverage strong.
dimension_notes.api_surface_coherence: Protocol types define clear interfaces. BM25Algorithm/BM25Variant naming documented.
dimension_notes.authorization_consistency: Not applicable — library. langchain.py lazy class well-tested.
dimension_notes.incomplete_migration: _Result/_MetaResult backward-compat aliases in search.py. All new code uses Result/MetaResult from _types.py.
dimension_notes.package_organization: _types.py centralises shared concerns. search.py ~750 lines. Could split into sub-package.
dimension_notes.ai_generated_debt: Minimal: base class, resolve_scorer, Protocol types eliminate all formulaic patterns.

issues.summary: WRatio/QRatio use PascalCase while other fuzz functions use snake_case
Some internal methods accept Any parameters where Protocol types would be appropriate
evidence: _reranker parameter typed as Any instead of RerankerProtocol
issues.suggestion: Gradually adopt Protocol types for internal parameters.

issues.summary: Some import error handlers use 'from None' losing original traceback
issues.suggestion: Use 'from e' to preserve causal chain.

issues.summary: search.py contains BM25 + HybridSearch + Reranker in one module
All modules at package root — could benefit from sub-packages for search, distance
evidence: search.py, engine.py, query.py, join.py, process.py all at root
issues.suggestion: Consider search/ sub-package grouping related modules.

issues.summary: No property-based testing (hypothesis) for fuzzy matching invariants
evidence: Fuzzy matching has well-defined invariants (triangle inequality, symmetry) but no property tests
issues.suggestion: Add hypothesis tests for key invariants like ratio symmetry and score bounds.

issues.summary: levenshtein_editops_multiword allocates vectors inside per-character loop
evidence: new_vp and new_vn allocated inside loop

issues.summary: Internal Rust index objects typed as Any
issues.suggestion: Not easily fixable due to PyO3 limitations.

issues.summary: BM25Algorithm (lowercase) and BM25Variant (PascalCase) use different casing
add_documents/remove_documents rebuild the entire Rust index
BM25Algorithm and BM25Variant literals serve different Rust endpoints with different casing
evidence: Different literal types for similar concepts

issues.summary: Some import error handlers discard original traceback
evidence: from None instead of from e

issues.summary: Document re-exported from search.py for backward compat
issues.suggestion: Remove if no external code imports Document from search.
